about.name: Dr. Jalpesh Mehta
about.tagline: Guiding Lives Through Ancient Vedic Wisdom
about.bioShort: Dr. Jalpesh Mehta is a highly respected Indian spiritual personality and founder of the Ramkrupa Foundation. Operating at the intersection of ancient scripture and modern life, he offers deep expertise as a Vedic Astrologer, Vaastu-Sastra Expert, and Bhagwat Kathakar.
about.bioLong: Dr. Jalpesh Mehta has dedicated over two decades to preserving and spreading the light of Sanatan Dharma. As the founder of the Ramkrupa Foundation and an active member of the Akhil Bharatiya Nagar Parishad, his discourses bridge the gap between traditional wisdom and contemporary challenges. He has guided thousands of individuals and families globally towards peace and prosperity through precise Janampatri readings, non-destructive Vaastu solutions, and heart-awakening Kathas.

services.title: Kundali / Janampatri
services.description: Detailed birth chart analysis with planetary positions, dashas, and life predictions.

services.title: Manglik Dosh Report
services.description: Comprehensive Manglik analysis with remedies and compatibility assessment.

services.title: Kaal Sarp Dosh
services.description: Identify and resolve Kaal Sarp Yoga through prescribed Vedic remedies.

services.title: Marriage Compatibility
services.description: Kundali Milan — Guna matching, dosh analysis, and auspicious muhurat selection.

services.title: Career & Business
services.description: Planetary guidance for career decisions, business naming, and financial growth.

services.title: Shani Sade Sati
services.description: Analysis of Saturn transit effects with protective remedies and gemstone guidance.

services.title: Home Vaastu Audit
services.description: Complete residential Vaastu analysis with non-destructive correction solutions.

services.title: Office / Commercial Vaastu
services.description: Optimize workspace energy for business growth and employee harmony.

services.title: Bhagwat Katha
services.description: 7-day immersive Shrimad Bhagwat Katha narration for spiritual awakening.

services.title: Shiv Puran Katha
services.description: Sacred narration of Shiv Puran with devotional music and community gathering.

services.title: Gemstone Consultation
services.description: Personalized gemstone recommendation based on planetary positions and dasha analysis.

services.title: Yearly Rashifal
services.description: Comprehensive yearly horoscope prediction for all 12 zodiac signs.

zodiacSigns.name: Mesh
zodiacSigns.prediction: A promising day for career growth. Financial stability improves. Focus on family bonds and health routines.

zodiacSigns.name: Vrushabh
zodiacSigns.prediction: Creativity and romance flourish today. Avoid risky investments. Students may receive good news regarding exams.

zodiacSigns.name: Mithun
zodiacSigns.prediction: Communication skills bring new opportunities. Travel plans may materialize. Maintain harmony in relationships.

zodiacSigns.name: Kark
zodiacSigns.prediction: Emotional well-being takes priority. Property matters show progress. Spiritual practices bring inner peace.

zodiacSigns.name: Simha
zodiacSigns.prediction: Leadership qualities shine at workplace. Social recognition increases. Health needs attention in the evening.

zodiacSigns.name: Kanya
zodiacSigns.prediction: Analytical mind helps solve pending issues. Financial gains from unexpected sources. Focus on balanced diet.

zodiacSigns.name: Tula
zodiacSigns.prediction: Partnerships and collaborations bring success. Legal matters may resolve favorably. Creative pursuits are rewarding.

zodiacSigns.name: Vrushchik
zodiacSigns.prediction: Transformation and renewal are key themes. Hidden truths may surface. Focus on long-term financial planning.

zodiacSigns.name: Dhanu
zodiacSigns.prediction: Higher learning and spiritual growth are favored. Travel brings fresh perspectives. Business expansion looks promising.

zodiacSigns.name: Makar
zodiacSigns.prediction: Discipline and hard work pay off. Recognition from superiors expected. Family celebrations bring joy.

zodiacSigns.name: Kumbh
zodiacSigns.prediction: Innovation leads to breakthroughs at work. Social connections expand. Health improves with regular exercise.

zodiacSigns.name: Meen
zodiacSigns.prediction: Intuition guides important decisions. Artistic talents gain appreciation. Romantic relationships deepen meaningfully.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Patel
testimonials.text: Dr. Jalpesh Mehta's kundali reading was incredibly accurate. His remedies for Kaal Sarp Dosh brought remarkable changes in my career within months. Truly blessed to have his guidance.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: The Vaastu consultation for our new home was transformative. Dr. Mehta identified issues we never thought of and provided simple, non-destructive solutions. Our family harmony improved significantly.

testimonials.name: Amit & Sneha Desai
testimonials.text: We attended the Shrimad Bhagwat Katha and it was a life-changing experience. Dr. Mehta's narration style touches the soul directly. We have become regular attendees of all his events.

testimonials.name: Kiran Joshi
testimonials.text: The marriage compatibility analysis was thorough and the muhurat selection was perfect. Dr. Mehta's predictions about our married life have been surprisingly accurate. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Vikram Thakkar
testimonials.text: My business was going through a rough patch. After Dr. Mehta's consultation and the gemstone he recommended, things started improving within weeks. His knowledge of Vedic astrology is unmatched.

galleryImages.alt: Pujya Dr. Jalpesh Mehta - Vedic Astrologer, Vaastu Expert
